source_old_req: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper subprogram shall establish parameter validity assumptions for the input data mag_in_data_x, mag_in_data_y, and mag_in_data_z. For each call to the subprogram, the implementation MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i shall guarantee that the output parameters mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, and mag_out_data_z are valid floating-point values within the range defined by the MAGNETO_SUB algorithm. The values of mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, and mag_out_data_z shall be deterministically computed based on the corresponding input parameters mag_in_data_x, mag_in_data_y, and mag_in_data_z. The subprogram shall maintain consistent mapping between its declared output parameters and the AADL parameter declarations in its implementation layer.
natural_requirement: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i. In the implementation layer, MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i shall route data flow from Spg.mag_out_data_x to Mag_Out_Data_X through P1 and data flow from Spg.mag_out_data_Y to Mag_Out_Data_Y through P2.

requirement_items.text: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.mag_out_data_x to Mag_Out_Data_X through connection P1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P1 from Spg.mag_out_data_x to Mag_Out_Data_X.

requirement_items.text: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.mag_out_data_Y to Mag_Out_Data_Y through connection P2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P2 from Spg.mag_out_data_Y to Mag_Out_Data_Y.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P1 from Spg.mag_out_data_x to Mag_Out_Data_X. The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P2 from Spg.mag_out_data_Y to Mag_Out_Data_Y.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.mag_out_data_x to Mag_Out_Data_X through connection P1. The MAGNETO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.mag_out_data_Y to Mag_Out_Data_Y through connection P2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
